title: bee-render/2 inventory sidecar + doctor deep skill audit (D7)
action: Upgrade the render sidecar to schema bee-render/2: {schema:'bee-render/2', target_runtime, skills:[{name, sha256 (deterministic hash of the rendered skill dir's file set)}]} — written by scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs AND the onboarding managed-target sync path (renderSkillBytes flow in onboard_bee.mjs) so all four runtime-target trees carry it. Readers accept bee-render/1 (legacy) with a shallow-only warn. Doctor doctorSkillsInstalled becomes a deep audit: expected list = sidecar skills[]; check every expected skill dir present, no unexpected plain bee-* strays, per-skill sha256 recomputed matches; mismatch names the drifted/missing/stray skill(s); legacy sidecar -> warn 'inventory unavailable (bee-render/1)'. Watch the FOUR consumers of the sidecar (renderer, onboard sync, plugin_distribution proof, doctor) for compat, and regenerate the release manifest (sidecar bytes change -> manifest churn is expected, one clean regeneration). Fixtures: deep-audit pass, missing-skill, stray-skill, hash-drift, legacy-sidecar warn.

truths: all four runtime-target trees carry bee-render/2 with per-skill hashes after render/onboard
doctor detects and names a missing skill, a stray bee-* dir, and a hash-drifted skill
bee-render/1 degrades to a shallow warn, never a crash
plugin_distribution and onboarding flows stay green with the new sidecar

verify: node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && node scripts/test_conformance.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: bee-render/2 inventory sidecar single-sourced (renderer dup deleted), per-skill digests, doctor deep audit names missing/stray/drifted skills and blocks on drift, v1 degrades to non-blocking warn, recheck honesty documented
trace.verification_evidence:
# g22-4 — done report (bee-render/2 inventory sidecar + deep skill audit)

Worker: g22-4-worker (sonnet, isolated worktree, rebased onto caa23b2).
Worker commit `0360f1d`, merged into main (post-merge re-render + manifest
regen). 2026-07-19.

## What shipped
- Schema single-sourced in onboard_bee.mjs (advisor R5 — the renderer's
  duplicate constant deleted): `bee-render/2` sidecar
  `{schema, target_runtime, skills:[{name, sha256}]}`, sha256 over the
  rendered per-runtime byte set via exported skillDigest/buildRenderSidecar/
  manifestFingerprint; both writers (renderer + onboarding managed sync)
  emit v2.
- Doctor deep audit: v2 → expected set from sidecar, recomputed digests,
  names missing/stray/drifted skills, blocking (mechanical under
  three-state); v1 → non-blocking "inventory unavailable" warn; missing →
  unchanged.
- Recheck honesty: onboarding drift never reads the sidecar (tree-fingerprint
  based), so v1-on-disk causes zero false drift — upgrade-on-apply for free,
  documented.
- Fixtures: conformance scenarios 14/15 (deep pass / missing / stray /
  hash-drift / legacy-warn) through the real binary; distribution suite → 40
  checks incl. a digest-recompute drift pin.

plugin_distribution 40/0; onboard_bee 0 failures; conformance ALL PASS;
bee_cli 185/0; lib_mirror PASS; manifest 362 match → G224_VERIFY_GREEN.
